sigma.title: Potential Kerberos Coercion by Spoofing SPNs via DNS Manipulation
Notepad++ Updater DNS Query to Uncommon Domains
Uncommon File Created by Notepad++ Updater Gup.EXE

osquery.name: t1557_003_shadow_read
osquery.query_text: SELECT target_path, action, uid, time FROM file_events WHERE (target_path LIKE '%shadow%' OR target_path LIKE '%passwd%' OR target_path LIKE '%.ssh/%' OR target_path LIKE '%credential%') LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1557_003_proc_cred
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline FROM processes WHERE cmdline LIKE '%shadow%' OR cmdline LIKE '%passwd%' OR cmdline LIKE '%mimikatz%' OR cmdline LIKE '%credential%' OR cmdline LIKE '%hashdump%' LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1557_003_file_access
osquery.query_text: SELECT target_path, action, uid, time FROM file_events WHERE action IN ('OPEN', 'READ') AND target_path NOT LIKE '/proc/%' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 100;

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 7 inherited-from-parent run(s) [no direct sub-technique executions], 8/8 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.

integrity.hash_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, default=str) excluding the integrity block itself
